message: 🌱 Add flux: kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes mission (#578)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-918-kustomize-v4-high-impact-breaking-changes",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes",
+    "description": "kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes. This issue affects 17+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flux upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flux deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\nThe latest release of [kustomize](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/releases) comes with breaking changes that have a high impact on Flux users."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes",
+        "description": "We've published an image of kustomize-controller compatible with kustomize v4, please give it try and report all issues to this PR https://github.com/fluxcd/kustomize-controller/pull/343\n\nTo test this please use the following\n```yaml\n$ kustomize version \n{Version:kustomize/v4.0.1 GitCommit:516ff1fa56040adc0173ff6ece66350eb4ed78a9 BuildDate:2021-02-14T05:00:02+00:00 GoOs:darwin GoArch:amd64}\n\n$ kustomize build github.com/fluxcd/flux2/manifests/install?ref=v0.8.0\nError: accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller' must resolve to a file': recursed accumulation of path '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade flux to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flux:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade flux flux/flux --namespace flux\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux\nhelm list -n flux\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm kustomize v4 high-impact breaking changes is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We've published an image of kustomize-controller compatible with kustomize v4, please give it try and report all issues to this PR https://github.com/fluxcd/kustomize-controller/pull/343\n\nTo test this please use the following image:\n\n```\nghcr.io/fluxcd/kustomize-controller:kustomize-v4-rc-de0310e7\n```\n\nTo upgrade kustomize-controller on an cluster bootstrapped with `flux`, add the following",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ kustomize version \n{Version:kustomize/v4.0.1 GitCommit:516ff1fa56040adc0173ff6ece66350eb4ed78a9 BuildDate:2021-02-14T05:00:02+00:00 GoOs:darwin GoArch:amd64}\n\n$ kustomize build github.com/fluxcd/flux2/manifests/install?ref=v0.8.0\nError: accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from '../bases/source-controller': '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller' must resolve to a file': recursed accumulation of path '/private/var/folders/bh/bp5hplld7g915wdvkt5w0y9w0000gn/T/kustomize-040141028/manifests/bases/source-controller': accumulating resources: accumulation err='accumulating resources from 'https://github.com/fluxcd/source-controller/archive/v0.8.0.zip//source-controller-0.8.0/config/crd': yaml: l",
+        "kustomize build https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/manifests/install?ref=v0.9.1",
+        "ghcr.io/fluxcd/kustomize-controller:kustomize-v4-rc-de0310e7"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/918",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2"
+    },
+    "reactions": 17,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T03:06:10.749Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
